audit_items.proof_trace: Property asserts Osaka-specific trie encoding must be enforced post-fork activation. Phase 02c found no Osaka trie encoding implementation. Phase 1-3 audit confirms: (1) all trie encoding is delegated to external alloy_trie library (crates/trie/common/src/lib.rs:72), (2) no fork-specific encoding parameters exist in StateRoot/StorageRoot/HashBuilder APIs, (3) Osaka fork checks in codebase are limited to blob params and block size validation (not trie encoding). The property itself appears to be based on incorrect specification assumptions—Ethereum's Osaka fork does not introduce trie encoding changes. Trie encoding rules (RLP-based Merkle Patricia Trie) have remained unchanged since Ethereum genesis and are not fork-dependent.
